debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E
Ω : Opens E
n : ℕ∞
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝² : OpensMeasurableSpace E
F : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup F
inst✝ : NormedSpace ℝ F
f f' : E → F
μ : Measure E
h : f =ᶠ[ae (μ.restrict ↑Ω)] f'
⊢ @Distribution.ofFunWithOrder E inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ Ω n inst✝³ inst✝² F inst✝¹ inst✝ f μ =
    @Distribution.ofFunWithOrder E inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ Ω n inst✝³ inst✝² F inst✝¹ inst✝ f' μ

by
  by_cases hf : LocallyIntegrableOn f Ω μ

    rw [ofFunWithOrder_apply hf, ofFunWithOrder_apply hf']

    filter_upwards [ae_restrict_iff' Ω.measurableSet |>.mp h] with x hx

    · rw [hx hxΩ]
    · simp [φ.eq_zero_of_not_mem_support (not_mem_subset φ.support_subset_opens hxΩ)]
  · have hf' : ¬LocallyIntegrableOn f' Ω μ := mt (·.congr h.symm) hf
    rw [ofFunWithOrder_of_not_locallyIntegrable hf, ofFunWithOrder_of_not_locallyIntegrable hf']
